hero.title: Design discovery helps you visualize your product for clarity in scoping & roadmap.

steps.title: Research & Understanding
steps.content: We begin by immersing ourselves in your business context: we study your users, analyze competitors through market research, and identify key features that will set your product apart.

steps.title: UX Mapping & Scope Alignment
steps.content: Through collaborative workshops, we discern major use cases for your product and create targeted user personas. These insights are then used to define your user journeys and determine your product’s scope.

steps.title: Wireframing & Visual Direction
steps.content: Next, we translate these user flows into real screens that bring your product’s major use cases to life. In doing so, we set up the look and feel of the product and establish the foundations of your design system.

steps.title: Interactive Prototyping & User Stories
steps.content: We transform your concept screens into interactive prototypes that stakeholders can interact with, positioning you to attract funding and investor interest. We also meticulously document these flows as user stories to provide tangible product direction before development begins.

steps.title: Roadmap for Development
steps.content: To wrap up the process, we create a strategic roadmap that outlines key milestones and collaborate with you on IT solutions, helping you seamlessly initiate product development.

keyDeliverables.heading: What you'll get in your design discovery.

items.title: UI/UX design for MVP
items.description: We translate your idea into a comprehensive, user-friendly experience that drives clicks and engagement.

items.title: User journey maps
items.description: We gather deep insights into customer interactions to optimize every touchpoint and enhance the UX.

items.title: Interactive prototypes
items.description: We showcase core user flows in action with dynamic prototypes that demonstrate functionality before development.

items.title: Design system guidelines
items.description: We ensure the scalability of your product with structured design principles and reusable components.

items.title: Project roadmap
items.description: We help you align stakeholders and streamline execution by providing a clear understanding of budget and scoping.

benefits.heading: From vision to execution, we set our partners up for success.

cards.title: Business Leaders
cards.description: We help you make informed design decisions with confidence, maximizing your ROI and aligning with strategic goals.

cards.title: Product Managers
cards.description: We give you clarity on UX priorities and establish a design roadmap that guides development efforts efficiently.

cards.title: Development Teams
cards.description: We set the stage for you with clear design specifications and visual direction that reduces ambiguity and streamlines implementation.

bottomCta.title: Ready to visualize your product?
bottomCta.subtitle: In just two weeks, our signature Design Discovery workshop will provide you with a design direction and product roadmap that sets you up for success.

items.question: How is a Design Discovery different from a full Discovery Workshop?
items.answer: Design Discovery focuses specifically on the user experience and visual design aspects of your product, while a full Discovery Workshop covers broader aspects including technical feasibility, business model validation, and development planning.

items.question: Can we skip Design Discovery if we already have wireframes?
items.answer: Wireframes are a great start, but Design Discovery goes deeper by validating those concepts with users, exploring visual language options, and creating interactive prototypes that stakeholders can experience and provide feedback on.

items.question: How long does the Design Discovery process take?
items.answer: Most Design Discovery engagements take 2-4 weeks, depending on the complexity of your product and the number of user journeys that need to be explored.

items.question: What happens after the Design Discovery phase?
items.answer: The insights and deliverables from Design Discovery feed directly into the development planning phase, providing clear direction for your engineering team and reducing implementation questions.
